mapper.select:
SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id, sc.course_id, sc.course_name, sc.teacher_id, sc.teacher_name, sc.selected_time, sc.learning_status, sc.progress_percentage, sc.total_study_time, sc.last_study_time, sc.completed_time, sc.rating, sc.review_content, sc.created_time, sc.updated_time FROM student_course sc
AND sc.student_id = #{q.studentId}
AND sc.course_id = #{q.courseId}
AND sc.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%')
AND (sc.learning_status IS NULL OR sc.learning_status != 'DROPPED')
AND sc.learning_status = #{q.persistedLearningStatus}
AND IFNULL(sc.progress_percentage, 0) = 0
ORDER BY
sc.selected_time
sc.progress_percentage
sc.last_study_time
sc.selected_time
ASC
DESC
sc.selected_time DESC

SELECT id, student_id, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, selected_time, learning_status, progress_percentage, total_study_time, last_study_time, completed_time, rating, review_content, created_time, updated_time FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND learning_status != 'DROPPED'

SELECT id, student_id, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, selected_time, learning_status, progress_percentage, total_study_time, last_study_time, completed_time, rating, review_content, created_time, updated_time FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY updated_time DESC, created_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id, sc.course_id, sc.course_name, sc.teacher_id, sc.teacher_name, sc.selected_time, sc.learning_status, sc.progress_percentage, sc.total_study_time, sc.last_study_time, sc.completed_time, sc.rating, sc.review_content, sc.created_time, sc.updated_time FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} AND sc.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id, sc.course_id, sc.course_name, sc.selected_time, sc.learning_status, sc.progress_percentage, sc.total_study_time, sc.last_study_time, sc.completed_time, sc.rating, sc.created_time, sc.updated_time FROM student_course sc
AND sc.course_id = #{q.courseId}
AND sc.learning_status = #{q.learningStatus}
ORDER BY
sc.selected_time
sc.progress_percentage
sc.total_study_time
sc.last_study_time
sc.selected_time
ASC
DESC
sc.selected_time DESC

SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id, sc.course_id, sc.course_name, sc.selected_time, sc.learning_status, sc.progress_percentage, sc.total_study_time, sc.last_study_time, sc.completed_time, sc.rating, sc.created_time, sc.updated_time FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} AND sc.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT sc.id, sc.student_id, sc.course_id, sc.course_name, sc.selected_time, sc.learning_status, sc.progress_percentage, sc.total_study_time, sc.last_study_time, sc.completed_time, sc.rating, sc.created_time, sc.updated_time FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY sc.selected_time DESC

SELECT id, student_id, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, selected_time, learning_status, progress_percentage, total_study_time, last_study_time, completed_time, rating, review_content, created_time, updated_time FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY selected_time DESC
